COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you how to use Shippit and
similar apps to automate orders in your Shopify
store. Apps like these claim to reduce fulfillment
times by up to 80%. One caveat: apps like Shippit
are good if you’re processing up to 500 orders a day.
Anything more and you should look into a WMS or
Warehouse Management System.
App Features
• 	Order fulfillment and delivery automation
• 	Different carrier options depending on rates
• 	Live shipping status updates
LESSON:
AUTOMATING YOUR
DELIVERY (SHIPPIT)
MODULE:
MANUFACTURING &
OPERATIONS AT SCALE
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Use the links in the resources to compare and
contrast applications.
❏ 	Narrow your pick to one and join the app.
